driver_insight: Ranchi Main Road's human apparent temperature of 39.1°C is primarily driven by high building density (NDBI 0.58), low vegetation cover (NDVI 0.10), low-albedo surface materials (albedo 0.13). Based on our dual AIML modeling, the city's heat dynamics are captured with high accuracy (Linear R² = 1.0, Random Forest R² = 0.979). In this city, every 0.1 increase in NDVI is associated with a 2.05°C change in LST.
